description: Global (self-hosted admin) config for the central Renovate runner that manages the whole
managed-repo fleet from this control-plane repo — NOT this repo's own dependency config
this file as the global config and authenticates as the CI GitHub App with a token scoped
to exactly the fleet (repositories: derived from config/*.yml). `autodiscover` then just
enumerates the repos that scoped token can see, so the token scope — not a soft filter — is
the boundary on which repos this runner touches.
